motifs: type-flag cards with left accent bar by type
hairline zone labels extending to the right edge

voice.register: plain declarative; calm facilitator who speaks rarely and is right; no hedging in product copy
anti: monitor / track / surveil as product verbs
promises ahead of the Trust Ladder

ethos.positioning: the unbuilt middle between transcription tools and voice LLMs: a third participant that takes a position on what matters, in real time, in front of the room
ethos.serves: id8Labs internal meetings (Case Zero), then the trusted inner circle by invite
values: Visibility Principle: participant, never surveillance; consent upstream of capability
Trust Ladder: capabilities earned, not shipped; wrong items cost more than missed items
under-surface: an empty board is correct behavior
graded, not vibed: no salience change ships without the golden eval GREEN
would_never: voice-out or cross-meeting memory before earned
remaining in a meeting without full consent

eval.form_parity_threshold: GREEN (one hallucination or trust violation is RED)
